title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oil India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Oil India:
Oil India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
